'2 great countries': Trump hails meeting with Xi as 'G-2 moment'
description: President Trump declared his China visit a historic "G-2" success, highlighting major trade deals including Boeing aircraft sales and agricultural commitments. He also suggested China would refrain from aggressive action on Taiwan during his presidency, while Xi Jinping privately warned of confrontation over the island. Trump indicated China's willingness to help broker an end to the Iran conflict.

title: Explained: CSK's qualification chances in IPL 2026 playoff race
description: With playoffs in sight, Gujarat Titans and Royal Challengers Bangalore are strong contenders, boasting high qualification probabilities. Sunrisers Hyderabad also hold a solid chance. Meanwhile, Punjab Kings and Rajasthan Royals have a decent shot, while Chennai Super Kings' prospects have dimmed. Kolkata Knight Riders and Delhi Capitals face slim hopes.

title: Stay clear of Aravalis till we decide its definition, says SC
4-year-old pulled out safely from borewell after 9-hour rescue operation in Punjab
description: A four-year-old boy was safely rescued from a newly dug borewell in Hoshiarpur, Punjab, after a challenging nine-hour operation. Multiple rescue agencies and local volunteers collaborated to pull the child out from a depth of 20 to 30 feet. The boy, who appeared stable after the rescue, was immediately taken to a hospital for examination.

description: TMC MP Abhishek Banerjee faces an FIR for alleged inflammatory statements, including remarks on DJs and Union Home Minister Amit Shah. He accused the Centre of allowing post-poll violence in West Bengal and manipulating the election counting process, with party candidates and agents allegedly removed from centers.

'Calling to molest again': Lucknow professor offers to leak exam paper to girl student
description: Lucknow University's zoology assistant professor is in police custody following allegations of leaking exam papers and making inappropriate advances towards a female student. Audio recordings, submitted by the student, reportedly capture the professor discussing paper leaks and offering academic favours in exchange for meetings. The university initiated an internal probe before police registered an FIR.

title: Unable to pay Rs 2k rent, Gujarat man lets landlord, aide repeatedly rape wife and daughter
description: A disturbing incident in Morbi, Gujarat, has surfaced where a tenant allegedly permitted his landlord and a relative to repeatedly assault his wife and 13-year-old daughter due to unpaid rent. The wife's mother filed a complaint, leading to the landlord's arrest and judicial custody. Police are searching for absconding relatives involved in the heinous crime.

This incident highlights the ongoing cyberbullying faced by women in the entertainment industry, with past cases involving actors Ramya, Rajini, Karunya Ram, and Mansi Joshi.

Ex-Google CEO Eric Schmidt has message for engineers who are still coding the old way
description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt declared the era of manual code writing is over, citing AI's explosive power. He believes programmers still using traditional methods are behind, as AI enables individuals to build powerful applications previously requiring large teams. This shift is causing a sell-off in software stocks, with companies needing to adapt quickly to survive.

Gold chain snatched from Bihar MLA Rahul Kumar’s brother during morning walk; watch
description: In a shocking midday heist, two masked individuals on a motorcycle swiftly snatched a gold necklace valued at around Rs 3 lakh from Rohit Kumar, the sibling of Jehanabad's MLA Rahul Kumar, in the bustling Kankarbagh area of Patna.

title: After Microsoft gave engineers access to Anthropic's Claude Code, company is canceling licenses
description: Microsoft is phasing out internal licenses for Anthropic's Claude Code AI tool, shifting developers to its own GitHub Copilot CLI platform. This strategic move, effective by the end of June, aims to streamline AI coding tools and align with Microsoft's engineering needs and financial year-end.

title: From Bay of Pigs to Blackouts: CIA chief's daylight visit to Havana as Cuba goes dark
description: The U.S. is reportedly employing economic pressure and political tactics to achieve a bloodless transition in Cuba, following decades of failed covert operations. CIA Director John Ratcliffe's visit to Havana signals a new approach, with Washington demanding fundamental changes for engagement, while intensifying sanctions and intelligence operations.

title: Bermuda Triangle mystery decoded: Scientists discover massive clue underwater
description: A remarkable geological discovery beneath Bermuda, a massive, unique rock layer, may finally explain the island's unusual elevation. Scientists used earthquake waves to reveal this 'life raft' structure, which has kept Bermuda afloat for millions of years, unlike other volcanic islands. While not solving Triangle myths, this real, measurable anomaly offers a fascinating new perspective.
